revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Place this at the top of '''documentation sub-pages''' of '''templates''' or '''modules''' which MAY call one or more "expensive parser functions" (see [[WP:EXPENSIVE]]). Include specific details, such as what parameters trigger expensive parser function usage, in the body of the template's documentation. If the template is highly unlikely to be the major reason a page reaches the 500-call limit, use your best judgment about using this at the top of the template's documentation page (see also [[:en:Banner blindness|Banner blindness]]). In any case, always note expensive parser function usage somewhere in the template's documentation. == See also == * [[:Category:Pages with too many expensive parser function calls]] * [[:Special:TrackingCategories]] * {{section link|Wikipedia:Template limits|Expensive parser function calls}} * [[Module:Preview expense]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Documentation header templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Place this at the top of '''documentation sub-pages''' of '''templates''' or '''modules''' which MAY call one or more "expensive parser functions" (see [[WP:EXPENSIVE]]). Include specific details, such as what parameters trigger expensive parser function usage, in the body of the template's documentation. If the template is highly unlikely to be the major reason a page reaches the 500-call limit, use your best judgment about using this at the top of the template's documentation page (see also [[:en:Banner blindness|Banner blindness]]). In any case, always note expensive parser function usage somewhere in the template's documentation. == See also == * [[:Category:Pages with too many expensive parser function calls]] * [[:Special:TrackingCategories]] * {{section link|Wikipedia:Template limits|Expensive parser function calls}} * [[Module:Preview expense]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Documentation header templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Expensive%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Place this at the top of '''documentation sub-pages''' of '''templates''' or '''modules''' which MAY call one or more "expensive parser functions" (see [[WP:EXPENSIVE]]). revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
